subparts.text: List five differences between traditional and digital marketing
Discuss the evolution of digital marketing through different stages of web development.
List some social media management platforms and their key features.
What are the different allocation criteria’s used for conversion attribution models.
What is the online marketing mix? Analyse its components and discuss how each is adapted in the digital context.
What are the key characteristics of online consumers? Analyse how these characteristics affect digital marketing strategies and the development of online customer experience
Discuss customer relationship management . How does eCRM support businesses in building long-term relationships with customers in the digital era? Explain with reference to Hubspot CRM.
Discuss how content management plays a crucial role in online marketing strategies. Analyse the challenges and best practices in managing content across various digital platforms.
What is Community marketing? Discuss some of the social media and community marketing objectives.
Discuss the usage and importance of different metrics supported by Google Analytics in traffic building strategies
